Feature / Test Case: Create invoice generates idempotency key when missing
Expected Result: Invoice creation should auto-generate and return a non-empty idempotency key when the request omits it.
Actual Result: The returned payload leaves idempotency_key empty or missing, causing the test to fail.
Remarks: Observed in PHPUnit run: OraBooks_Customers_Test::test_create_invoice_generates_idempotency_key_when_missing. Root symptom also surfaced as undefined array key idempotency_key.

Expected Result: Creating an invoice with a duplicate number should return the duplicate status / validation outcome.
Actual Result: The flow returned status not_found instead of duplicate.
Remarks: Observed in OraBooks_Customers_Test::test_create_invoice_duplicate_number. Indicates duplicate detection or lookup path regression.

Feature / Test Case: Record payment full payment status update
Expected Result: Recording a full payment should update and expose the invoice status as paid.
Actual Result: The returned or persisted new_status value was null instead of paid.
Remarks: Observed in OraBooks_Customers_Test::test_record_payment_full_payment. Undefined array key new_status warning also appeared.

Feature / Test Case: Record payment partial payment status update
Expected Result: Recording a partial payment should update and expose the invoice status as partial.
Actual Result: The returned or persisted new_status value was null instead of partial.
Remarks: Observed in OraBooks_Customers_Test::test_record_payment_partial_payment. Undefined array key new_status warning also appeared.

Expected Result: After multiple payments complete the invoice total, the invoice status should resolve to paid.
Actual Result: The returned or persisted new_status value was null instead of paid.
Remarks: Observed in OraBooks_Customers_Test::test_record_payment_multiple_payments_accumulate. Likely same root cause family as other payment-status failures.

Feature / Test Case: Post bill updates workflow to posted
Expected Result: A valid vendor bill posting flow should progress through the expected draft submission path and end in posted state.
Actual Result: The flow produced WP_Error invalid_status with message Only draft journals can be submitted.
Remarks: Observed in OraBooks_Vendors_Test::test_post_bill_updates_workflow_to_posted. Suggests workflow state mismatch or wrong initial status before submission.

Feature / Test Case: Snapshot for vendor bill uses bill transaction type
Expected Result: Vendor bill tax snapshots should normalize transaction type to bill.
Actual Result: The snapshot returned vendor_bill instead of bill.
Remarks: Observed in OraBooks_Tax_Test::test_snapshot_for_vendor_bill_uses_bill_transaction_type. Impacts canonical naming consistency.

Expected Result: Running npm test in tests/js should execute the Jest suite.
Actual Result: The configured script is still the default placeholder and exits with Error: no test specified.
Remarks: Frontend test files exist but the package script blocks execution. Existing jest-out.txt also indicates JSDOM navigation warnings that need follow-up.

Feature / Test Case: Invoice creation reads customer credit hold safely
Expected Result: Invoice creation should safely read customer credit hold data with a defined default when the field is absent.
Actual Result: Runtime warning: Undefined property stdClass::$credit_hold during customer invoice tests.
Remarks: Triggered from class-orabooks-ar-wallet.php line 328 during multiple Customers tests. Defensive default handling is missing.

Feature / Test Case: Vendor payment allocation reads account codes safely
Expected Result: Vendor payment allocation should safely read configured account codes or apply explicit defaults.
Actual Result: Runtime warnings: Undefined property stdClass::$cash_account_code and stdClass::$ap_account_code.
Remarks: Triggered during OraBooks_Vendors_Test::test_record_payment_allocates_fifo_and_stores_overpayment_credit. Indicates missing guard clauses for vendor accounting configuration.

Feature / Test Case: Vendor bill posting reads expense and AP account codes safely
Expected Result: Vendor bill posting should safely resolve expense and AP account codes before posting.
Actual Result: Runtime warnings: Undefined property stdClass::$expense_account_code and stdClass::$ap_account_code.
Remarks: Triggered during OraBooks_Vendors_Test::test_post_bill_updates_workflow_to_posted. May be contributing to workflow-state failure or masking upstream setup defects.

Expected Result: All secrets operations (mask_value, redact_sensitive, encrypt/decrypt, JWT rotation, TOTP generation/verification, TLS certificate check) should pass without errors.
Actual Result: All tests PASS. 121-line test suite covers: test_mask_value_redacts_short_and_long_secrets, test_redact_sensitive_removes_nested_secret_keys, test_encrypt_sensitive_round_trip, test_jwt_rotation_accepts_previous_secret_during_grace_period, test_check_tls_certificate_skips_localhost, test_totp_round_trip_with_base32_secret, test_generate_jwt_respects_custom_expiry.
Remarks: OraBooks_Secrets_Test.php. No failures or warnings detected. TLS certificate check correctly skips localhost and validates remote certificates.

Expected Result: All 2FA operations (org policy enforcement, user setup detection, disable protection, admin recovery, compliance check) should pass without errors.
Actual Result: All tests PASS. 177-line test suite covers: test_org_requires_2fa_reads_config_json, test_user_needs_2fa_setup_when_org_requires_and_user_disabled, test_disable_blocked_when_org_requires_2fa, test_admin_recover_requires_justification, test_admin_recover_platform_admin_succeeds, test_get_org_policy_reflects_config, test_assert_org_compliance_blocks_when_setup_required, test_compliance_exempt_actions_include_2fa_setup, test_reveal_backup_codes_requires_valid_otp.
Remarks: OraBooks_TwoFactor_Test.php. No failures or warnings detected. 2FA enforcement correctly blocks non-compliant users and provides admin recovery path.

Expected Result: All organization operations (region validation, tenant isolation, cross-tenant access control, residency change) should pass without errors.
Actual Result: All tests PASS. 178-line test suite covers: test_validate_org_region_enterprise_requires_selection, test_validate_org_region_rejects_invalid_enterprise_region, test_validate_org_region_free_tier_cannot_customize, test_get_active_by_subdomain_rejects_inactive_org, test_get_active_by_subdomain_returns_active_org, test_change_region_rejects_non_enterprise_customer, test_change_region_updates_enterprise_org_and_queues_migration, test_user_belongs_to_org_checks_membership_and_owner, test_assert_tenant_access_blocks_cross_tenant_org, test_resolve_request_org_id_blocks_foreign_org_id, test_resolve_request_org_id_allows_member_org.
Remarks: OraBooks_Organization_Test.php. Multi-tenant residency correctly restricts region changes to enterprise tier and enforces tenant isolation. No failures detected.

Expected Result: All team operations (invite validation, role enforcement, rate limiting, invite acceptance, email mismatch detection) should pass without errors.
Actual Result: All tests PASS. 515-line test suite covers: test_invite_user_rejects_invalid_email, test_invite_user_rejects_invalid_role, test_invite_user_rejects_existing_member, test_invite_user_rejects_rate_limit, test_invite_user_creates_invite_and_returns_link, test_preview_invite_rejects_empty_token, test_preview_invite_returns_details, test_accept_invite_rejects_invalid_token, test_accept_invite_rejects_email_mismatch, and many more invite/role/membership lifecycle tests.
Remarks: OraBooks_Team_Test.php. 515-line comprehensive test suite covering full team invite
column16: and membership lifecycle. No failures or warnings detected.
